title: potentilla minima
intro: Potentilla minima, also known as dwarf cinquefoil, is a low-growing, perennial herbaceous plant belonging to the rose family (Rosaceae). The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, which can be attributed to the presence of tannins and flavonoids. The health benefits of Potentilla minima include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce inflammation, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used topically to treat wounds, skin conditions, and minor infections.
